content: Hjaalmarch Guard: Fuckin’ cold out here today, eh? Snow’s blowin’ so hard I can barely see the mine entrance. Almost makes me wish I was stationed someplace warmer—like fuckin’ Windhelm’s brothels. Lydia: Windhelm? Shit. Rather freeze my tits off than live under Ulfric’s boot. Jarl Balgruuf’s the only ruler who understands true Nord pride. Though if you wanna see a real war, you should see Serana and me fightin’ over who gets to suck MJR’s cock first. Hjaalmarch Guard: Ha! Sounds like you’re losing that battle, shield-sister.
